uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

DataRoom.title: DataRoom
DataRoom.description: A virtual data room containing documents.

ownerId.description: UID of the user who created the room.

allowedUsers.description: List of user UIDs who have access to this room.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the room was created.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: A document stored within a data room.

roomId.description: ID of the data room this document belongs to.

uploadedBy.description: UID of the user who uploaded the document.

expiryDate.description: Optional timestamp when the document expires.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the document was uploaded.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: A Q&A thread for a specific document.

docId.description: ID of the document this question refers to.

authorId.description: UID of the user asking the question.

authorEmail.description: Email of the user asking the question.

answeredBy.description: UID of the admin who answered.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the question was asked.

answeredAt.description: Timestamp when the answer was provided.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Audit trail of actions performed in the VDR.

userId.description: UID of the user who performed the action.

action.description: Description of the action (e.g., 'Viewed Document', 'Uploaded Document').

/rooms/{roomId}/documents/{docId}.description: Documents within a specific data room.

/rooms/{roomId}/documents/{docId}/questi.description: Q&A threads for a specific document.
